_observed: 2026-06-12 base6 paired sweep. An eBay multi-variation listing fronted by a DIFFERENT card's title ('Mysterious Fossil 109/110') while its getItem Card Number aspect read 79/110 — it verified for base6-79-machop with every gate green (Set + Number + Finish + Language all present and matching the Machop target). The displayed/clicked listing title would have been the wrong card. The resolver prefilter's name-corroboration stage drops candidates whose title carries no substantial token of the target card's name ('machop'), pre-getItem. Lenient by construction: token-less names disable the stage.
title: Mysterious Fossil 109/110 Legendary Collection Reverse Holo
